data.title: WeRide launches GENESIS simulation model to enhance AV development with generative AI.

data.title: SkillsUSA Week 2026 celebrates CTE and student advocacy in workforce shortage with events from Feb. 2-6. #1 org for students.
data.description: In Leesburg, Virginia, SkillsUSA, the leading workforce development organization for students, will be celebrating SkillsUSA Week 2026 from February 2 to 6. This event coincides with Career and Technical Education (CTE) Month, highlighting the importance of CTE programs in preparing students for the workforce. This annual week serves as a significant opportunity to raise awareness and promote the benefits of CTE education and training for learners.

data.title: reVolver Podcasts adds Cine Papis to its network, expanding entertainment lineup. Hosted by Martinez, Bago, and Fernandez.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, the Dallas headquartered on-demand audio content producer and multicultural podcast network, reVolver Podcasts, revealed that Cine Papis has become a part of the network. The show is hosted by Eddin Martinez, Juan Bago, and Jaime Fernandez.

data.title: The Salvation Army aids those affected by Winter Storm Fern with essential services amid freezing temps and heavy snowfall.
data.description: Amidst harsh winter storms bringing freezing temperatures and heavy precipitation nationwide, The Salvation Army in ALEXANDRIA, Va., announced on Jan. 27, 2026, that they are actively assisting vulnerable populations. They are offering crucial services to individuals and families affected by the snowfall, providing much-needed support during this challenging period.
